basics.name: Ramkumar Murthy
basics.label: Software Engineer (Platform & DevOps)
basics.availability: Open for Freelance & Full-Time Opportunities (Remote / Hybrid) — Platform Engineering, DevOps, SRE, Network Automation & Orchestration
basics.summary: Platform & Automation Engineer with 2+ years of experience building and automating reliable backend and internal platform workflows. Strong expertise in Python-based automation, CI/CD pipelines, and API-driven integrations across Azure and AWS cloud environments. Proven ability to integrate ServiceNow with enterprise systems, engineer network orchestration via Infoblox and Palo Alto, and improve deployment reliability and operational efficiency at scale. Also open for freelance engagements in DevOps, SRE, automation scripting, backend development, and cloud infrastructure projects.

work.summary: Platform & Automation Engineer building internal platform workflows, enterprise system integrations, and cloud-native automation pipelines across Azure and AWS environments. Open for freelance projects in parallel.
highlights: Designed and implemented reusable Python-based automation for internal platform workflows, integrating with ServiceNow to improve reliability and reduce manual operational effort.
Engineered API-based orchestration for enterprise systems including Infoblox and Palo Alto, enabling standardized and scalable network integrations across environments.
Automated access management using SQL and Windows-level controls, improving provisioning consistency and compliance with security policies.
Supported deployments across Dev, UAT, and Production by optimizing backend workflows and producing LLD documentation for repeatable and reliable releases.

work.summary: Software Developer Expertise for AI Training - Freelancer
highlights: Reviewed and validated AI-generated Python and SQL code used in automation scenarios, focusing on correctness, edge cases, and maintainability.
Created structured evaluation prompts to identify failure cases in AI-assisted code generation workflows.
Trained generative AI models (LLM) by crafting and evaluating complex computer science questions and Python code, providing expert feedback to enhance AI coding accuracy and performance.

work.summary: Full-stack engineer focused on dashboard development, pipeline automation, and distributed systems monitoring in large-scale enterprise test environments.
highlights: Developed an Angular-Flask dashboard to monitor Jenkins pipeline metrics, improving build visibility and reducing manual troubleshooting time.
Built and consumed RESTful APIs to automate backend data handling and optimize database queries in large-scale testing environments.
Implemented ELK Stack pipelines for structured log parsing and operational monitoring of distributed systems.
Automated Jira defect workflows using REST APIs, improving incident triage efficiency and turnaround time.
Actively participated in agile development and shift-left testing processes, leveraging Git/GitHub and Bitbucket for version control and managing Linux testbeds for testing and deployment.
Completed training in CCNA, Python Programming, Java Full Stack Development (DevOps, Agile), and professional skills.

work.summary: Responsible for maintaining documents and operating systems at a die casting company.
highlights: Utilizing SAP for maintaining die life and running status, as well as raising PR and PO.
Performing data entry and system operation duties.

freelance.note: Open for remote freelance engagements globally alongside full-time opportunities.

projects.name: Digital Document Scanner
projects.description: Developed a mobile app for document scanning, QR code tools, and sketching, enabling users to efficiently digitize and organize documents.

projects.name: IPC Search Engine
projects.description: Created a search engine using Python and Django to facilitate quick and accurate retrieval of relevant IPC sections for legal research.

projects.name: SMRT Proctor
projects.description: Developed a desktop app for online exam proctoring with live camera and screen sharing. Integrated UIPath automation for email-to-Excel, Excel-to-html code conversion.

projects.name: Fyit Downloader
projects.description: Designed and developed an open-source Windows desktop application for media video downloads and WhatsApp message scheduling, achieving significant downloads on SourceForge.

projects.name: Web Applications
projects.description: Developed web applications and cross-platform applications using GitHub and Firebase for hosting, and cloud services like AWS and GCP for backends.

certifications.name: CCNA: Networks, Switching, Routing & Wireless Essentials, Networking, Security & Automation From Data to Insights with Google Cloud

references.reference: I wholeheartedly recommend Ramkumar as a highly proficient Python expert with exceptional problem-solving skills. His valuable contributions have greatly benefited our team, and his dedication to tackling complex challenges is truly commendable.
